Is the ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card free?
No, the card has a joining fee of ₹3,000 and an annual fee of ₹2,000.
When will I get my Joining Benefits for the Rubyx Credit Card?

Upon payment of the joining fee, Credit Cardholders will receive welcome vouchers worth over ₹15,000 on their registered e-mail ID within 45 days. There are vouchers worth ₹2,000 from Tata CLiQ, ₹2,000 from EaseMyTrip (2 vouchers of ₹1,000 each for domestic flight bookings), ₹1,000 from Croma (2 vouchers of ₹500 each), ₹3,000 from EaseMyTrip for holiday packages and ₹10,000 from Elivaas. You also get a 3-month EazyDiner Prime Membership worth ₹1,095 and up to 35% discount at Avis for car rentals.To know more about redemption of vouchers, click here
• Verify with OTP (Choose SMS or E-Mail)
• Tick consent and tap Generate OTP
• Enter the OTP received and tap SUBMIT and full voucher code and PIN will be shared on your register mail ID.
• View claimed vouchers in Order History → Tap voucher → Show Code (OTP required again) → View your voucher code & PIN

To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Rubyx Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder.
Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here .

Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period.
Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter
What are the movie ticket benefits available?

Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹150 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Customers with dual Credit Card variants can avail one offer per month per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed Terms & Conditions, please click here

As a Rubyx Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for a round or lesson of golf for every ₹50,000 spent on retail purchases in the previous calendar month. You can avail of a maximum of 2 rounds per month. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit https://teetimes.truztee.com/ and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered against your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months.
Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes.truztee.com/ with your registered mobile number.

Upgrade your travel experience with complimentary access to railway with your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card. Get 2 complementary access to select railway lounges in India every quarter. Simply present your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card to enjoy the privileges
Over and above the permitted number of complimentary access, each subsequent access will be charged as per rates laid out by each lounge service provider.
The access to railway lounges will be applicable only for primary cardholders.

Is there a joining fee and Annual fee for the Rubyx Credit Card?
Yes. The Rubyx Credit Card has a joining fee of ₹3,000 + GST and annual fee of ₹2,000 + GST.
When will I get my Joining Benefits for the Rubyx Credit Card?

Upon payment of the joining fee, Credit Cardholders will receive welcome vouchers worth over ₹5,000 on their registered e-mail ID within 45 days. There are vouchers worth ₹2,000 from Tata CLiQ, ₹2,000 from EaseMyTrip (2 vouchers of ₹1,000 each for domestic flight bookings), ₹1,000 from Croma (2 vouchers of ₹500 each), ₹3,000 from EaseMyTrip for holiday packages and ₹10,000 from Elivaas. You also get a 3-month EazyDiner Prime Membership worth ₹1,095 and up to 35% discount at Avis for car rentals.
To know more about redemption of vouchers, click here
Verify with OTP (Choose SMS or E-Mail)
Tick consent and tap Generate OTP
Enter the OTP received and tap SUBMIT and full voucher code and PIN will be shared on your register mail ID.
View claimed vouchers in Order History → Tap voucher → Show Code (OTP required again) → View your voucher code & PIN

To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Rubyx Credit Card in a preceding spend quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder.
For the customers with dual Credit Card variants(Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) , the entitlement includes 2 domestic lounge visits per quarter for each variant.
Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here .

Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period.
Plus (Add-on) card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter

As a Rubyx Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for a round or lesson of golf for every ₹50,000 spent on retail purchases in the previous calendar month. You can avail of a maximum of 2 rounds per month. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit https://teetimes.truztee. com / and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered against your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months.
Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes. truztee .com/ with your registered mobile number.

Enjoy complimentary access to railway lounge with your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card. Get 2 complimentary access to the selected railway lounges in India every quarter. Simply present your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card to enjoy the lounge benefits
Any additional access beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider The access to railway lounges will be applicable only for primary cardholders.

Is an ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card free?
No, the Card has a joining fee of ₹6,500 and an annual fee of ₹3,500.

Upon payment of the joining fee, Cardholders will receive welcome vouchers worth over ₹13,000 within 45 days. There are vouchers worth ₹3,000 from Tata CliQ, ₹4,000 from EaseMyTrip (4 vouchers of ₹1,000 each),₹1,095 EazyDiner Prime Membership(3 months subscription), ₹5,000 Da Milano and ₹1,500 from Croma(3 vouchers of ₹500 each). Detailed redemption steps and terms can be accessed through the official Credit Card website.
How can Cardholders claim their joining vouchers?
To claim the joining vouchers, cardholders can follow the steps outlined in the card’s terms and conditions.
Click here  to know more about the steps to claim vouchers.

What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow?

Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026.
Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026.

Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow?
Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025.
Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below-
Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking
Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards
Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’
Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page.

Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of up to ₹4,000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card.

Yes. The Sapphiro Credit Card has a joining fee of ₹6,500 + GST and annual fee of ₹3,500 + GST.

Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent.
What birthday benefits are offered with the Emeralde Credit Card?
Eligible Emeralde Credit Card customers can receive a ₹5000 birthday benefits voucher on eligible American Express variant cards, subject to the applicable terms and conditions.

To enable card controls for your HDFC Bank Credit Card through NetBanking, follow these steps:
1. Log in to HDFC Bank NetBanking using your Customer ID.
2. Go to the Cards Tab >Select the card > Click Manage card>Manage Domestic and International Limits.
3. You will be able to view your existing daily domestic and international usage limits.
4. Enable or disable Online, Contactless, and International usage based on your preference.
5. Click ‘Update’, enter the OTP received on your registered mobile number, and then click ‘Continue’.
6. Your selected card controls will be updated instantly.
To enable card controls for your HDFC Bank Credit Card conveniently through our HDFC Bank MobileBanking App, follow these steps:
1. Open the HDFC Bank MobileBanking App and log in using your credentials.
2. Go to the ‘Cards’ section from the menu.
3. Select the HDFC Bank Credit Card for which you want to enable card controls.
4. Click ‘Manage Limits’, then enable/disable transaction types such as Online Transactions, Contactless Payments, and International Usage, or set transaction limits according to your preference.
5. Click ‘Update’ to confirm your changes and enter your MPIN. The updated card control settings will be applied instantly.
For more detailed management, you can also use our MyCards platform at https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/ which offers a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
To enable card controls for your HDFC Bank Credit Card via MyCards, follow these steps:
1. Visit the MyCards portal- https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/ on your desktop or mobile.
2. Log in using your registered mobile number and the OTP received.
3. For first-time users, enter the last four digits of your card.
4. On the card homepage, click the ‘Card Control’ tab.
5. Enable/disable features such as Online Transactions, Contactless Transactions, International Usage, and set usage limits as per your preference.
6. Confirm your settings, and the changes will be applied instantly.
You can conveniently enable card controls for your HDFC Bank Credit Card through PayZapp by following these steps:
1. Open the PayZapp app and log in using your credentials.
2. On the homepage, tap the ‘MyCards’ tab> Select ‘Go to MyCards’.
3. Log in using your registered mobile number and the OTP sent to your mobile.
4. If you are a first-time user, enter the last four digits of your HDFC Bank Credit Card.
5. On the card homepage, tap the ‘Card Control’ tab.
6. Enable or disable features such as Online Transactions, Contactless Transactions, and International Usage, or set usage limits according to your preference.
7. Confirm your settings. The updated card control settings will be applied instantly.
To enable card controls for your HDFC Bank Credit Card using WhatsApp Banking, follow the steps given below:
1. Add HDFC Bank’s official WhatsApp number – 7070022222 – to your contacts.
2. Send the text "Credit Card" to this number.
3. You will receive a reply with options. Choose the option “Manage My Card”
4. You will receive a reply with options to select “Domestic / International/ Enhance limits”
5. Choose the option you want to enable, such as Domestic Online Transactions, Contactless Transactions, or International Transactions.
6. Enter the transaction limit you want to set. An OTP will be sent to your registered mobile number. Enter the OTP to confirm the change.
7. Enter the last 4 digits of your Credit Card number.
8. The current status of the selected transaction type will be shown as Enabled.
To enable or modify your HDFC Bank Credit Card controls and transaction limits, you can contact HDFC Bank's toll-free numbers:
Toll-free numbers : 1800 1600 or 1800 2600 (available from 8 am to 8 pm)
By contacting our toll-free numbers, you can enable/modify limits for Domestic, International, Online, Contactless, ATM, and POS transactions on your Debit or Credit Card.
